name: Special Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 bag fresh spinach, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soy sauce, vinegar, crushed garlic, and olive oil in a bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. Toss the spinach with the dressing.
4. Toast the sesame seeds lightly.
5. Be careful, as they burn easily.
6. Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds over the spinach.
7. Toss again to combine.
8. Garnish with slivered red and yellow peppers.
